name: Autumn Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, cinnamon, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the softened cream cheese with 1/2 cup sugar until well blended. Add one egg at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture over the baked crust.
5. Toss the thinly sliced peeled apples with the remaining sugar and cinnamon. Spread the apple slices over the cream cheese layer and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
6. Return the pan to the oven and bake at 350 degrees F. for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until set.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the springform pan.
8. Chill thoroughly before serving.
